name: com.flying-gorilla-studios.ui-flight
description: Launch pooled UI Images from screen, world, uGUI, or UI Toolkit anchors along a bezier path toward a target UI element.

samples.description: Minimal example that flies a sprite from a source Image to a target Image.
Example that resolves a UI Toolkit VisualElement target from a UIDocument.
Example that launches a sprite from a world position toward a UI Toolkit target.
